mapper.insert: INSERT INTO content_publish_attempt( attempt_id, post_id, user_id, idempotent_token, transcode_job_id, attempt_status, risk_status, transcode_status, snapshot_content, snapshot_media, location_info, visibility, published_version_num, error_code, error_message, create_time, update_time ) VALUES( #{attemptId}, #{postId}, #{userId}, #{idempotentToken}, #{transcodeJobId}, #{attemptStatus}, #{riskStatus}, #{transcodeStatus}, #{snapshotContent}, #{snapshotMedia}, #{locationInfo}, #{visibility}, #{publishedVersionNum}, #{errorCode}, #{errorMessage}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT attempt_id, post_id, user_id, idempotent_token, transcode_job_id, attempt_status, risk_status, transcode_status, snapshot_content, snapshot_media, location_info, visibility, published_version_num, error_code, error_message, create_time, update_time FROM content_publish_attempt WHERE attempt_id = #{attemptId}

SELECT attempt_id, post_id, user_id, idempotent_token, transcode_job_id, attempt_status, risk_status, transcode_status, snapshot_content, snapshot_media, location_info, visibility, published_version_num, error_code, error_message, create_time, update_time FROM content_publish_attempt WHERE idempotent_token = #{idempotentToken}

SELECT attempt_id, post_id, user_id, idempotent_token, transcode_job_id, attempt_status, risk_status, transcode_status, snapshot_content, snapshot_media, location_info, visibility, published_version_num, error_code, error_message, create_time, update_time FROM content_publish_attempt WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND attempt_status IN (#{statusCreated}, #{statusTranscoding}, #{statusPendingReview}) ORDER BY attempt_id DESC LIMIT 1
